name: Fish Baked with Squash, Onions and Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1 to 1 1/4 lbs fish fillets (I used mahi-mahi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Spread oil in the bottom of a 9x12 inches baking dish.
3. Spread half of the onions, zucchini, and squash in the baking pan.
4. Place fish on top of the vegetables.
5. Sprinkle remaining vegetables over the fish.
6. Drizzle lemon juice over everything.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Cover with aluminum foil.
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and sprinkle with fresh herbs before serving.
I used chives, tarragon, thyme, and a few sage leaves. You could also use parsley or dill. I would steer clear of too much sage or rosemary since they can be overpowering. And, I wouldn't replace them with dried herbs as the more subtle flavor of fresh herbs is what makes the dish.
